---
title: "Portable Anomaly Detection for Distributed PGAS Programs Based on Array Mapping Abstractions"
date: 2026-06-16
year: 2026
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3815001.3815002"
venue: "ARRAY 2026"
award: ""
code: ""
slides: ""
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Raneem Abuyosef
  - name: Thomas Huddleston
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Martin Kong
categories:
  - Workshop
description: ""
---
